company.name: Acme B2B Solutions
company.tagline: Connect, automate, and grow your business with modern B2B workflows.
company.description: A simple B2B website powered by JSON-driven content. Build trust with enterprise customers, showcase services, and deliver a strong commercial value proposition.

services.title: Supply Chain Automation
services.subtitle: Streamline order processing and logistics.
services.description: Automate purchase orders, inventory tracking, and supplier collaboration with a single platform.

services.title: Customer Portal
services.subtitle: Give clients secure self-service access.
services.description: Offer quotes, order history, invoices, and project updates in one branded portal.

services.title: Analytics & Reporting
services.subtitle: Make better decisions with live data.
services.description: Track revenue, pipeline, and operational KPIs with dashboards built for enterprise teams.

contact.headline: Ready to scale your B2B operations?
